events.summaryZh: Royal Exhibition Building 汇集 200 多个澳洲食品品牌，可一路试吃、看厨师示范、买小批量甜点和调味品；更像全家共享的冬日美食节，不是儿童专场。
events.summaryEn: More than 200 Australian producers fill the Royal Exhibition Building with tastings, chef demonstrations and small-batch treats, making this a shared family food outing rather than a kids-only session.
events.priceZh: 成人 $15 起；儿童政策见购票页
events.priceEn: Adult entry from $15; check ticketing for child conditions
events.mapQuery: Royal Exhibition Building 9 Nicholson Street Carlton VIC
events.referenceZh: The Little Food Market 官方活动页。
events.referenceEn: The Little Food Market official event page.

events.summaryZh: 100 多个美食摊位配合芒果主题食品、文化表演、嘉年华游乐、脸绘和骆驼体验，室内外都有区域，适合全家从午餐玩到傍晚。
events.summaryEn: More than 100 food stalls join mango specialties, cultural performances, carnival rides, face painting and camel rides across indoor and outdoor areas for a full family day.
events.mapQuery: Sandown Racecourse 591-659 Princes Highway Springvale VIC
events.referenceZh: 活动主办方 FAQ 与社区公告核实。
events.referenceEn: Verified against the organiser FAQ and community event notice.

events.summaryZh: 由 CERES 与西区多个 council 合作，把社区采收的橄榄压成油；即使没有交橄榄也可参加节日，适合对食物、园艺和社区制作过程感兴趣的家庭。
events.summaryEn: CERES and western councils turn locally harvested olives into shared oil, with the festival open even to families who did not contribute olives; a hands-on food and community outing.
events.timeZh: 7月18日（周六）；具体开放时间及免费票见官网
events.timeEn: Saturday 18 July; check the official page for session hours and free tickets
events.referenceZh: Brimbank Council 官方活动页，活动由 CERES 及合作 councils 举办。
events.referenceEn: Brimbank Council official event page; delivered with CERES and partner councils.

events.summaryZh: 周六晚在 MCG 看两支墨尔本传统球队对阵，适合想让孩子体验大型体育现场的家庭；Round 19 仍在 14 岁以下儿童优惠活动范围内，订票时确认条件。
events.summaryEn: A Saturday-night MCG clash between two traditional Melbourne clubs, suited to families wanting a major live-sport atmosphere; confirm the Round 19 kids offer when booking.
events.timeZh: 7月18日（周六）晚场；开球时间见官方票务
events.timeEn: Saturday 18 July, evening; confirm bounce time with official ticketing
events.priceZh: 票价及 14岁以下优惠以官方购票页为准
events.priceEn: Check official ticketing for prices and the under-14 offer
events.mapQuery: Melbourne Cricket Ground Brunton Avenue Richmond VIC
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动页。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official event page.

events.summaryZh: 把塑料瓶盖现场再造成自己的笔或登山扣，孩子能看见废料变成可用物件的完整过程；适合把短时手作和 Docklands 吃饭、散步组合。
events.summaryEn: Turn recycled bottle tops into a pen or carabiner and see waste become a useful object, an easy hands-on stop to combine with a Docklands meal or walk.
events.timeZh: 7月19日起开放；本周场次以官网为准
events.timeEn: Opens 19 July; check the official page for this week's sessions
events.placeZh: Melbourne CBD / Docklands，地点见预订页
events.placeEn: Melbourne CBD / Docklands; confirm venue when booking
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official event information.

events.tagZh: Royal Botanic Gardens · 灯光步道
events.summaryZh: 夜间灯光、音乐和大型装置串成花园步道，适合大人和孩子一起体验冬夜氛围；需要户外步行，出发前按天气准备。
events.summaryEn: A night trail of light, music and large-scale installations through the gardens, designed as a shared winter experience for adults and children; dress for outdoor walking.
events.timeZh: 7月17日-24日晚间多场；预订指定入场时间
events.timeEn: Evening sessions from 17-24 July; book a timed entry
events.priceZh: 儿童 $32；成人 $42；3岁以下免费；以官网为准
events.priceEn: Children $32; adults $42; under 3 free; check official pricing
events.mapQuery: Royal Botanic Gardens Melbourne Observatory Gate
events.referenceZh: Royal Botanic Gardens 与 City of Melbourne 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: Royal Botanic Gardens and City of Melbourne official event information.

events.summaryZh: 免费动手展把 Play School 的角色、道具和电视制作方式变成可玩的空间，适合学龄前到低年级家庭，也方便和 Federation Square 午餐组合。
events.summaryEn: A free hands-on exhibition turns Play School characters, props and television-making into a playable space for preschool and early-primary families near Federation Square.
events.referenceZh: ACMI 与 City of Melbourne What's On 官方信息。
events.referenceEn: ACMI and City of Melbourne What's On official information.

events.summaryZh: 以“戏剧化宴会”为灵感的免费儿童展，让家庭通过装扮、表演和视觉场景进入艺术作品；适合把 NGV 正展与孩子自己的参与空间放在同一天。
events.summaryEn: A free children's exhibition inspired by a theatrical feast, inviting families into dress-up, performance and visual play alongside a wider NGV visit.
events.timeZh: 7月17日-24日；随 NGV 开放时间
events.mapQuery: NGV International 180 St Kilda Road Melbourne
events.referenceZh: NGV 与 City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: NGV and City of Melbourne What's On official event information.
